parityMeta.describes: AppData snapshot hash stability — locks buildAppDataSnapshotHash + stableStringify (FNV-1a) against a tiny, synthetic AppData-shaped payload that exercises kg/lb fields and an unknown open-bag settings field. The Swift port must reproduce the same `phase19b-xxxxxxxx` hash byte-for-byte.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Hand-authored minimal payload. Includes a known unitSettings.weightUnit (kg) and a future-unknown iosOpenBagField under settings to prove the open-bag preservation contract.

iosOpenBagField.iosOnlyHint: preserve me across legacy web app<->iOS round trip
